testcase.name: lsfae01
testcase.error: <subscriptOutOfBoundsError/error/condition> Error in ``[<-`(`*tmp*`, rc$row, rc$col, value = value)`: subscript out of bounds Backtrace: x 1. +-testthat::expect_snapshot_file(...) at test-lsfae01.R:2:3 2. | \-testthat:::check_string(path) 3. | \-testthat:::.rlang_check_is_string(...) 4. | \-rlang::is_string(x) 5. +-scda.test:::write_test_rtf_for("lsfae01.R") 6. | \-base::source(ipath) at ./helper.R:20:3 7. | +-base::withVisible(eval(ei, envir)) 8. | \-base::eval(ei, envir) 9. | \-base::eval(ei, envir) 10. \-junco::tt_to_tlgrtf(...) 11. \-tidytlg::gentlg(...) 12. \-base::mapply(...) 13. \-tidytlg (local) `<fn>`(...) 14. \-tidytlg:::gentlg_single(...) 15. \-huxtable::set_align(ht, alignment$row, alignment$col, alignment$value) 16. \-huxtable:::prop_set(...)
